com.example.giant.v1.Giant.description: Giant is the synthetic giant Kind of the huge-CRD perf pass.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource.

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize objects.

name.description: Name must be unique within a namespace.

namespace.description: Namespace defines the space within which each name must be unique.

spec.description: GiantSpec concentrates the pathologies real giant CRDs spread out.

chain.description: chain is an array of object items.

freeform.description: freeform is the schema-blind subtree; composing routes it to raw YAML.

grade.description: grade selects one of 25 admissible values.

grid.description: grid is the wide sibling fan lifting the document past 10k schema-addressable nodes.
